skill.name: tavily-web
skill.description: Web search, content extraction, crawling, and research capabilities using Tavily API
skill.summary: Web search and research skill powered by Tavily API for AI assistants
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All four static findings are false positives. The skill file (SKILL.md) is a simple markdown documentation file with no executable code. The scanner misidentified a bash installation command as 'Ruby/shell backtick execution', a GitHub URL as 'hardcoded URL', and falsely detected 'weak cryptographic algorithms' in plain text descriptions. This is a legitimate web search skill with no security concerns.

medium_findings.title: External Command Reference in Documentation
medium_findings.description: Static scanner flagged line 19 as 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' but this is a bash installation command in a markdown code block. This is a documentation example, not executable code.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: This is a code block showing an npx command for skill installation. No actual shell execution occurs - it's documentation text.

low_findings.title: GitHub URL Reference
low_findings.description: Line 29 contains a GitHub URL reference. This is a standard documentation link to the project repository, not a security concern.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard documentation link to the project's own GitHub repository for examples. No external or suspicious URL.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Cryptographic Algorithm Detection
low_findings.description: Static scanner falsely detected 'weak cryptographic algorithms' at lines 3 and 35. These lines contain plain text descriptions with no cryptographic code.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Lines contain plain text YAML frontmatter and troubleshooting guidance. No cryptographic algorithms present - clear scanner misidentification.

content.value_statement: Enable your AI assistant to search the web, extract content from URLs, and perform research tasks using the Tavily API.
actual_capabilities: Search the web for current information using Tavily API
Get contextual answers from web sources
limitations: Requires a Tavily API key to function
API rate limits apply based on Tavily subscription
Only works within the Tavily API service endpoints
No local file system access for crawled content

use_cases.title: Research Assistant
use_cases.description: Search for current information and gather sources for research projects

use_cases.title: Content Verification
use_cases.description: Verify facts and get up-to-date information from the web

use_cases.title: Technical Documentation Lookup
use_cases.description: Find and extract information from technical documentation and APIs

prompt_templates.title: Basic Web Search
prompt_templates.prompt: Search the web for information about [TOPIC]
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need quick current information on a topic

prompt_templates.title: Extract URL Content
prompt_templates.prompt: Extract the main content from [URL] and summarize it
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need to get information from a specific webpage

prompt_templates.title: Deep Research
prompt_templates.prompt: Perform a deep research on [TOPIC], covering key aspects and sources
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need comprehensive research on a complex topic

prompt_templates.title: Compare Sources
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for multiple sources about [TOPIC] and compare their viewpoints
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need balanced information from different perspectives

output_examples.input: Search the web for Claude Code recent updates
output: Here are the latest updates about Claude Code:
For more details, visit the official Anthropic documentation.
Summary: This page covers the basics of...
Key sections: Getting Started, API Reference, Tutorials

best_practices: Configure your Tavily API key via environment variables for security
Use specific search queries for more accurate results
Review extracted content for accuracy before using in important work
anti_patterns: Do not use for illegal content extraction or scraping protected sites
Avoid making excessive API calls that could hit rate limits
Do not rely solely on web search for critical factual information without verification

faq.question: How do I get a Tavily API key?
faq.answer: Visit the Tavily website to sign up for an account and obtain an API key. Configure it via environment variables as shown in the skill documentation.

faq.question: Can this skill bypass paywalls?
faq.answer: No. The skill only extracts publicly accessible content. Paywalled content cannot be accessed.

faq.question: How accurate are the search results?
faq.answer: Search quality depends on your query specificity and the Tavily API. More specific queries yield better results.

faq.question: Is there a rate limit?
faq.answer: Yes, Tavily has rate limits based on your subscription tier. Check Tavily documentation for details.

faq.question: Can I use this for commercial research?
faq.answer: Yes, as long as you comply with Tavily's terms of service and the website's terms of use for any content accessed.

faq.question: Does this work with all AI assistants?
faq.answer: This skill is designed for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. Compatibility may vary with other AI assistants.
